testcase.name: Kangur Game Quick Start › opens training setup from quickStart=training and clears query params

failure.message: kangur-game-quickstart.spec.ts:14:3 opens training setup from quickStart=training and clears query params

testcase.failure:
features/kangur/kangur-game-quickstart.spec.ts:14:3 › Kangur Game Quick Start › opens training setup from quickStart=training and clears query params
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_ABORTED; maybe frame was detached? Call log: - navigating to "http://127.0.0.1:61587/kangur/game?quickStart=training", waiting until "load"
13 | 14 | test('opens training setup from quickStart=training and clears query params', async ({ page }) => { > 15 | await page.goto('/kangur/game?quickStart=training'); | ^ 16 | 17 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/kangur\/game/); 18 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/quickStart=/); at /Users/michalmatynia/Desktop/NPM/2026/Gemini new Pull/geminitestapp/e2e/features/kangur/kangur-game-quickstart.spec.ts:15:16

testcase.name: Kangur Game Quick Start › starts operation run from quickStart=operation and clears query params

failure.message: kangur-game-quickstart.spec.ts:28:3 starts operation run from quickStart=operation and clears query params

testcase.failure:
features/kangur/kangur-game-quickstart.spec.ts:28:3 › Kangur Game Quick Start › starts operation run from quickStart=operation and clears query params
Error: expect(page).not.toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: not /quickStart=/ Received string: "http://127.0.0.1:61587/kangur/game?quickStart=operation&operation=division&difficulty=easy" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "not toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "http://127.0.0.1:61587/kangur/game?quickStart=operation&operation=division&difficulty=easy"
30 | 31 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/kangur\/game/); > 32 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/quickStart=/); | ^ 33 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/operation=/); 34 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/difficulty=/); 35 | await expect(page.getByText(/Pytanie 1 z 10/i)).toBeVisible(); at /Users/michalmatynia/Desktop/NPM/2026/Gemini new Pull/geminitestapp/e2e/features/kangur/kangur-game-quickstart.spec.ts:32:28

testcase.name: Kangur Game Quick Start › opens operation setup from bare quickStart=operation and clears query params
Kangur Learner Profile › renders learner profile shell and baseline sections
Kangur Learner Profile › supports navigation from game screen to learner profile
Kangur Learner Profile › renders deterministic learner metrics from mocked auth, progress, and scores
Kangur Learner Profile › shows the persisted AI tutor mood on the learner profile
Kangur Learner Profile › opens focused lesson from recommendation deep link

failure.message: kangur-profile.spec.ts:249:3 opens focused lesson from recommendation deep link

testcase.failure:
features/kangur/kangur-profile.spec.ts:249:3 › Kangur Learner Profile › opens focused lesson from recommendation deep link Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dzielenie' }) Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dzielenie' }) resolved to 2 elements: 1)

Dzielenie

aka getByTestId('active-lesson-header').getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dzielenie' }) 2)

Dzielenie

aka locator('h1') Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dzielenie' }) 312 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/kangur\/lessons/); 313 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/focus=/); > 314 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dzielenie' })).toBeVisible(); | ^ 315 | await expect(page.getByTestId('lesson-hub-section-intro')).toBeVisible(); 316 | }); 317 | at /Users/michalmatynia/Desktop/NPM/2026/Gemini new Pull/geminitestapp/e2e/features/kangur/kangur-profile.spec.ts:314:68 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../tmp/playwright-runs/web/perf-validation-2/kangur-perf-e2e/test-results/features-kangur-kangur-pro-ab111-om-recommendation-deep-link/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../tmp/playwright-runs/web/perf-validation-2/kangur-perf-e2e/test-results/features-kangur-kangur-pro-ab111-om-recommendation-deep-link/error-context.md attachment #3: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../tmp/playwright-runs/web/perf-validation-2/kangur-perf-e2e/test-results/features-kangur-kangur-pro-ab111-om-recommendation-deep-link/trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ../tmp/playwright-runs/web/perf-validation-2/kangur-perf-e2e/test-results/features-kangur-kangur-pro-ab111-om-recommendation-deep-link/trace.zip ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Kangur Learner Profile › quick-start training works from profile in local mode
Kangur Learner Profile › quick-start operation works from operation performance links
